name: output-content-moderation
description: Block model outputs that contain harmful content (hate, self-harm, sexual, violence).

config.fallback_response: I cannot produce that content. Please refine your topic so it stays within the policy scope.

rationale: Output validation runs synchronously after the model returns. A blocked output still incurs the model token cost — this is unavoidable. Logged in Request Traces UI for incident review.
